nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Rain. Cloudy. Low around 40, with temperatures rising to around 50 overnight. Southwest wind around 18 mph, with gusts as high as 43 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.shortForecast: Scattered Rain Showers then Partly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: Scattered rain showers between 10am and noon. Partly sunny, with a high near 41. West wind 14 to 21 mph, with gusts as high as 36 mph.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 22. West wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 38. Southwest wind 6 to 9 mph.

nws.name: Wednesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 28. South wind 3 to 7 mph.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 45. South wind 3 to 8 mph.

nws.name: Thursday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 32. South wind around 8 mph.

nws.name: Friday
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Light Rain then Mostly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain between 11am and noon. Mostly sunny, with a high near 52. Southwest wind 6 to 9 mph.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.shortForecast: Chance Light Rain then Chance Rain And Snow
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain between 10pm and 5am, then a chance of rain and snow. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 37. Southwest wind around 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain and snow. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 49. Northwest wind 9 to 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 33. Southwest wind around 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 51. Southwest wind around 14 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws.name: Sunday Night
nws.shortForecast: Chance Light Rain then Slight Chance Snow
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain before 2am, then a slight chance of snow. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 31. Northwest wind around 14 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New snow accumulation of 1 to 3 inches possible.

nws.name: Monday
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Snow then Partly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of snow before 11am. Partly sunny, with a high near 42. Northwest wind around 15 mph. New snow accumulation of 1 to 3 inches possible.
